description_long: This object is a tall, decorative candle set in an ornate candlestick holder. The candle itself is a vibrant pink color with visible vertical grooves and a rounded, beige tip that resembles an unlit flame. The holder is made of a warm brown material, possibly wood or painted metal, and features a slender stem with a bulbous midsection and a wide, stable base. The candle sits securely in a shallow dish at the top of the holder, which is slightly flared to catch any dripping wax. The overall design is elegant and classical, suitable for both indoor and outdoor urban settings. The surface of the holder appears matte with a subtle texture, while the candle has a slightly smoother finish.
description: A tall pink candle with a rounded tip sits in an ornate brown candlestick holder with a bulbous midsection and wide base. The design is elegant and classical, with visible grooves on the candle and a matte finish on the holder.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full height of the pink candle and the detailed, bulbous midsection of the brown holder.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view revealing the candle's grooves and the symmetrical shape of the holder's base.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the slender stem and the flared dish supporting the candle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 2, showing the rounded tip of the candle and the elegant curvature of the holder.
